title: Kids Characters School Backpack Officially Licenesed with Adjustable Straps
description:
Does your child love superheroes? This officially licensed kid’s backpack features some of everyone’s favorite Marvel Avengers: The Incredible Hulk, Captain America, Iron Man, and more! The backpack has a large interior compartment for safely storing school supplies, padded and adjustable straps for a custom fit, and a bold, colorful Avengers front graphic that is sure to turn heads. This Avengers backpack is incredibly lightweight and easy for little kids to carry comfortably. The straps are adjustable (14 to 29 inches) which offers extra support for most kids. Easy to clean, the vinyl-like interior can be spot cleaned and wiped down if a lunch or water bottle is spilled, and the soft exterior can also be wiped as needed

Kids Characters School Backpack Officially Licenesed with Adjustable Straps

Does your child love superheroes? This officially licensed kid’s backpack features some of everyone’s favorite Marvel Avengers: The Incredible Hulk, Captain America, Iron Man, and more! The backpack has a large interior compartment for safely storing school supplies, padded and adjustable straps for a custom fit, and a bold, colorful Avengers front graphic that is sure to turn heads.

Key Features

  • AVENGERS SCHOOL BACKPACK - Officially licensed Marvel kids backpack features one of everyone’s favorite superheroes - Captain America, Incredible Hulk, Iron Man and more; Features large interior compartment, padded and adjustable shoulder straps and a bold, colorful Avengers front graphic
  • COMFORTABLE AND LIGHTWEIGHT - Avengers backpack is incredibly lightweight and easy for kids to carry comfortably; Straps are padded and adjustable for custom comfort (14 to 29 inches); Offers extra support and a great fit for most little kids
  • EASY TO CLEAN - Vinyl-like interior is easy to wipe down if a water bottle or lunch is spilled; Soft exterior can also be spot cleaned, or the entire backpack washed on the cold setting for a deeper clean when needed (air dry only)
  • VERSATILE TRAVEL BAG - Designed for carrying school supplies, Avengers backpack can also be used as an overnight back for sleepovers, a travel backpack for family vacations and playdates, or as a Summer camp backpack with its large and roomy interior compartment
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Officially licensed by Marvel (Avengers); Dimensions: 15” x 12” x 4.5”; Colors: Assorted; Washable: yes (cold setting and air dry only); Adjustable straps: yes

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 15CHBPAVG
  • UPC: 678634717863

This Avengers backpack is incredibly lightweight and easy for little kids to carry comfortably. The straps are adjustable (14 to 29 inches) which offers extra support for most kids. Easy to clean, the vinyl-like interior can be spot cleaned and wiped down if a lunch or water bottle is spilled, and the soft exterior can also be wiped as needed. If you need a deep clean, throw it in the washing machine on the cold setting and let air dry.

Designed for carrying school supplies, this versatile kid’s travel bag can also be used as an overnight back for sleepovers, a travel backpack for vacations and road trips, or as a Summer camp backpack with its roomy interior compartment. Your little one will love showing off their favorite characters on their brand-new backpack this year!
